free_text: ASYMMETRY IN ELASTIC AND INELASTIC SCATTERING OF
POLARIZED PROTONS FROM TI-48,TI-50,FE-54 AND FE-56.
THE TARGETS USED RANGED FROM 1 TO 4 MG/CM**2 IN
THICKNESS,ALL EXCEPT TI-50 WERE BETTER THAN 98% PURE.
TI-48 RESULTS COME BOTH FROM A 20% TI-48 IMPURITY IN
THE TI-50 TARGET AND FROM THE PURE TI-48 TARGET.
WERE PROVIDED BY 300 MUM SURFACE BARRIER DETECTORS
LOCATED IN FRONT OF EACH THICK COUNTER.
THE OVERALL ENERGY RESOLUTION OF THIS SYSTEM WAS ABOUT
